goal: Imagen editorial para la sección de review highlight del homepage de rentatelo.com — una viajera LATAM auténtica en Wynwood Miami, riendo genuinamente frente a un mural hiperrealista de 5 pisos, transmitiendo la experiencia cultural única que un carro permite descubrir.

creative_direction.core_idea: Una viajera LATAM real en Wynwood Miami — la experiencia cultural única que un carro permite descubrir
creative_direction.visual_thesis: La mujer es pequeña frente al mural — escala y autenticidad. Este es el Miami que vale la pena llegar en carro, no en Uber

composition.layout: subject lower-center or slightly left-of-center, mural filling entire background as 5-story scale backdrop — subject appears small relative to mural to emphasize scale

camera.framing: 4:5 portrait card — subject occupying lower 40% of frame, mural filling upper 60% and all sides behind subject
camera.angle: eye-level, slight distance to include full subject body and significant mural height above her
camera.lens_style: 35mm editorial — slightly wider than portrait to include environmental scale
camera.depth_of_field: subject sharp, mural in same focal plane (she is against the wall) — both sharp simultaneously

overlay_compatibility.overlay_zone: bottom strip below subject feet — dark pavement or shadow base

subject.ethnicity: Latin American — Colombian, Venezuelan, or Mexican appearance
subject.expression: laughing genuinely — spontaneous, not posed, looking slightly off-camera with real vacation joy — the kind of laugh from a surprising or delightful moment
wardrobe: simple neutral or pastel casual summer outfit — white, cream, or pale blue
minimal jewelry — small earrings or none
subject.body_language: natural and unposed — perhaps turning slightly, weight shifted, mid-laugh, hand gesture optional but not forced
subject.position_in_frame: lower center of frame, feet visible, full standing height, small relative to 5-story mural behind her

scene.location: Wynwood Arts District, NW 2nd Avenue corridor, Miami, Florida
scene.time_of_day: mid-morning or midday — bright diffused natural light, no harsh direct shadows on face
environment: large-scale hyperrealist mural on warehouse wall — 5-story height, filling entire background
Wynwood street pavement — dark concrete, slightly worn
urban warehouse wall texture around mural edges
natural Florida daylight diffused — no harsh noon shadows
scene.background_view: hyperrealist mural with vibrant multicolor content filling entire frame behind subject — large human or animal figures rendered in photorealistic detail, highly saturated colors, monumental scale making subject appear small
critical_scene_rules: mural must be clearly hyperrealist style — not abstract, not graffiti lettering
mural must fill 100% of background — no sky, no building edge, no street visible above mural
no text or words visible on mural surface
no competitor brand logos visible anywhere
subject must be clearly smaller than mural — scale contrast is the visual thesis
expression must be genuinely laughing — not a posed smile or neutral expression
no other people visible in frame
lighting must be bright and natural — no moody shadows on subject face

lighting.primary: bright diffused Florida natural light — overcast-bright or open shade from building
lighting.quality: even and flattering on subject face — soft shadows, no harsh noon sun strips
lighting.mural_lighting: flat even light revealing full mural color saturation — no spotlight or dramatic shadows on wall
lighting.skin_treatment: warm natural skin tones — no cool cast, no heavy retouching
lighting.overall: bright, vibrant, energetic — matches the Wynwood cultural energy

dominant: vibrant hyperrealist mural colors — multicolor, highly saturated background
warm LATAM skin tones on subject
accent: subject outfit neutral — white or cream to contrast vivid mural
amber F0B576 tonal warmth in skin highlights
rules: mural background must be vivid and saturated — the color drama lives in the mural, not the subject
subject outfit must be neutral or pastel to avoid competing with mural
warm skin tones on subject — no cool or grey cast
overall image: vibrant and joyful — maximum cultural energy
no desaturation, no moody color grading

negative_prompt: posed or stiff smile — must be genuine spontaneous laugh
subject facing camera directly in formal portrait pose
abstract or graffiti-lettering mural — must be hyperrealist figurative
text or words visible on mural wall
harsh direct sunlight creating shadow stripes on face
sky visible above mural — mural must fill entire background
master_prompt: Editorial portrait for rentatelo.com homepage review highlight section — the authentic cultural experience a LATAM family discovers by having their own car in Miami. A Latin American woman aged 33 to 44 stands in Wynwood Arts District on NW 2nd Avenue, Miami, Florida. She is laughing genuinely — spontaneous, not posed — looking slightly off-camera with real vacation joy, mid-laugh, natural body language with possible hand gesture. Simple neutral or pastel outfit: white or cream top, no brand logos, minimal jewelry, no sunglasses. She stands against an enormous hyperrealist mural on a warehouse wall — 5-story scale, vibrant multicolor content with photorealistic human or animal figures filling the entire background behind her. The subject is clearly small relative to the mural — scale contrast is intentional and central. The mural fills 100% of the background; no sky, no street visible above. Composition 4:5 portrait, subject in lower center of frame, full standing height visible, mural dominating upper portion. 35mm natural perspective, subject and mural in same sharp focal plane. Lighting: bright diffused Florida natural light — mid-morning open shade, even and flattering, no harsh shadows on face. Color: vivid saturated mural background, warm natural skin tones, neutral subject outfit as contrast anchor. No text on mural, no competitor logos. Avoid: posed smile, formal portrait pose, abstract or lettering mural, text on mural, other people, harsh shadow on face, sunglasses, branded clothing, sky visible above mural, dark or moody tone, stock photo aesthetic, text, watermarks.
